name: oled_display_ssd1309
description: OLED SSD1309 display plugin for Volumio – shows playback info, clock, progress, audio format, and volume on a 128x64 I2C OLED
author: Zhapox

volumio_info.details: Drives a 128x64 SSD1309 I2C OLED display showing playback info, clock, progress bar, audio format, volume overlay, and screensaver. Designed for Raspberry Pi with zero MPD interference.
volumio_info.changelog: v1.7.17: install.sh now removes the plugin folder on a failed install (Volumio plugin store compliance).
